criteria.description: Each Phase 5 keyframe must read unambiguously as Sean's character (identity coherence with the A-2 anchor) and as a traditional pencil test drawing (cream paper, visible graphite line weight, construction lines).
Phase 6 motion clips must preserve stylus-in-right-hand continuity across every extracted frame and keep identity drift within the SF02 envelope established by the bracketing keyframes.
The Phase 8 assembled cut must loop seamlessly (closing pose matches opening pose) and read as a single coherent pencil-test sequence, not a stitched composite of model artifacts.
